root: ^You pass through the entrance to the Order of Llewellyn's camp, dozens of eyes following you on your way to Knight-commander Astel's tent.

^Inside the spacious command tent, you spot the imposing figure leaning over a long table. On it is a detailed map of the area, of the Stone Tower. She glances up as you arrive and performs a perfectly stiff salute.
^"Mage-lord Khosara, I'm honoured to meet you, though I wish the circumstances were better."
^List the attrocities of the Empire and their emperor.
^Explain how her assistance could mean freedom from the Empire's yoke for all of Galericca.

aid_granted: ^"It is the duty of a monarch to lead their followers, never to enrich themselves. It would be a great dereliction of my duties to commit my forces to your cause. However, when the time comes, my blade will be yours."
aid_denied: ^"We all have responsibilities, duties to the world and each other. A ruler must lead, a serf must till the land. I have no interest in fomenting the dreams of seditious peasants. I wish you the best of luck, Mage-lord Khosara. That will be all."
